name: Computer Vision
description: Research focused on enabling computers to interpret and understand visual information from images and videos, including tasks such as image classification, object detection, segmentation, and visual recognition.

name: Natural Language Processing
description: The field of AI concerned with the interaction between computers and human language, encompassing text understanding, generation, translation, sentiment analysis, and question answering.

name: General
description: A broad category encompassing machine learning research and tasks that don't fit specifically into vision or language domains, including general ML methods, optimization, and cross-domain approaches.

name: Audio
description: Research on processing, understanding, and generating audio signals, including speech recognition, music generation, sound classification, and audio synthesis.

name: Adversarial
description: Need to test model robustness? Benchmark resilience against adversarial attacks and evaluate defense mechanisms.

name: Agentic AI
description: Benchmarks for autonomous agents, software engineering agents, web agents, desktop agents, and terminal-based task execution.

name: Audio
description: Processing general audio signals? Test your models on sound classification, event detection, music analysis, and source separation.

name: Computer Code
description: Developing AI coding assistants? Test code generation, completion, translation, bug detection, and repair capabilities.

name: Computer Vision
description: Building systems that understand images and video? Find benchmarks for recognition, detection, segmentation, and document analysis tasks.

name: Graphs
description: Working with network data? Test graph learning models on node classification, link prediction, and molecular property tasks.

name: Industrial Inspection
description: Building quality control systems? Benchmark anomaly detection, defect classification, and automated visual inspection for manufacturing.

name: Knowledge Base
description: Building knowledge systems? Evaluate graph completion, relation extraction, and entity linking performance.

name: Medical
description: Building healthcare AI? Find benchmarks for medical imaging, disease diagnosis, clinical text processing, and drug discovery.

name: Methodology
description: Improving learning efficiency? Test self-supervised, few-shot, transfer, and continual learning approaches.

name: Mobile Development
description: Benchmarks evaluating AI code generation for mobile platforms — React Native, Flutter, Swift, Kotlin. Tests real-world patterns: navigation, animation, state management, platform APIs.

name: Multimodal
description: Combining vision and language? Evaluate image captioning, visual QA, text-to-image generation, and cross-modal retrieval models.

name: Natural Language Processing
description: Processing and understanding text? Evaluate your models on language understanding, generation, translation, and information extraction benchmarks.

name: Reasoning
description: Testing if your model can think logically? Benchmark math problem solving, commonsense understanding, and multi-step reasoning capabilities.

name: Reinforcement Learning
description: Training agents to make decisions? Benchmark your policies on game playing, continuous control, and offline learning tasks.

name: Robots
description: Building robotic systems? Find benchmarks for manipulation, navigation, and simulation-to-reality transfer.

name: Speech
description: Working with voice and audio? Evaluate speech-to-text accuracy, voice synthesis quality, and speaker identification performance.

name: Time Series
description: Predicting future trends or detecting anomalies? Benchmark forecasting accuracy and pattern recognition in sequential data.
